scene.message: Black Girl: This is no time{nl} for doing this!{waitkey}{clearbox}Hey, have you seen my papa?{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: One floor up.{nl} He's at a stage-like spot.{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: Who on earth{nl} was that girl...{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Why is there{nl} a little girl here?{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: It must be{nl} a Monster!{waitkey}{ret}
